content.query:
DROP TABLE [ODS].[ERP_GL_TRANSACTIONS]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [ODS].[ERP_GL_TRANSACTIONS]
( 
	[Module] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[BatchNumber] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[LineNbr] [int]  NULL,
	[Account] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[AccountDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_accountRequireUnits] [bit]  NULL,
	[Branch] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[BranchName] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_cATranID] [bigint]  NULL,
	[CostCode] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[CostCodeDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[CreatedBy] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_createdByScreenID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_createdDateTime] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[GLTran_creditAmt] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[CreditAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[DebitAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[GLTran_curyInfoID] [bigint]  NULL,
	[RemainingReclassAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[GLTran_debitAmt] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[PeriodID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[IncludedinReclassHistory] [bit]  NULL,
	[InventoryID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[InventoryIDDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_isInterCompany] [bit]  NULL,
	[GLTran_isNonPM] [bit]  NULL,
	[GLTran_isReclassReverse] [bit]  NULL,
	[LastModifiedBy] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_lastModifiedByScreenID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_lastModifiedDateTime] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[GLTran_ledgerBalanceType] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_ledgerID] [int]  NULL,
	[GLTran_nextPostYear] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_nextTranYear] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[NonBillable] [bit]  NULL,
	[GLTran_noteID] [uniqueidentifier]  NULL,
	[OriginalAccount] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[OriginalAccountDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[OrigBatchNbr] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[OrigLineNbr] [int]  NULL,
	[OrigModule] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_origPMTranID] [bigint]  NULL,
	[OriginalSubaccount] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[OriginalSubaccountDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[ProjectTranID] [bigint]  NULL,
	[GLTran_posted] [bit]  NULL,
	[GLTran_postYear] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Project] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[ProjectDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Quantity] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[ReclassBatchModule] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[ReclassBatchNumber] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassificationProhibited] [bit]  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassified] [bit]  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassOrigTranDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassReleasedCount] [int]  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassRemainingAmt] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[ReclassSequenceNbr] [int]  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassSourceTranBatchNbr] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassSourceTranLineNbr] [int]  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassSourceTranModule] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_reclassTotalCount] [int]  NULL,
	[ReclassificationType] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[CustomerVendor] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[RefNumber] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_released] [bit]  NULL,
	[Selected] [bit]  NULL,
	[GLTran_skipNormalizeAmounts] [bit]  NULL,
	[Subaccount] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[SubaccountDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_summPost] [bit]  NULL,
	[ProjectTask] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[ProjectTaskDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[TaxCategory] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[TaxCategoryDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[TaxID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_tranClass] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[TransactionDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[TransactionDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_tranID] [int]  NULL,
	[GLTran_tranLineNbr] [int]  NULL,
	[MasterPeriodID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_tranType] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_tranYear] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[UOM] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[GLTran_zeroPost] [bit]  NULL,
	[BatchDescription] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[VendorID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[VendorName] [nvarchar](max)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [TransactionDate] ),
	HEAP
)
GO
